description.LOCATION_EN: Hong Kong-Zhuhai-Macao Bridge (HZMB) Hong Kong Link Road (HKLR)

2024-10-01T16:10:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to high wind , the following special traffic and transport arrangements have been implemented on Hong Kong-Zhuhai-Macao Bridge (HZMB) HKLR, with details as shown below: The speed limit of the HZMB HKLR is lowered from 100 km/h to 50 km/h.

2024-10-03T11:15:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to improved weather condition, the following arrangements have been implemented on Hong Kong-Zhuhai-Macao Bridge (HZMB) HKLR: The speed limit of the HZMB HKLR resumes to 100 km/h.

2024-10-02T09:59:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to watermain burst , all lanes of Siu Sai Wan Road (Fullview Garden bound) near Hiu Tsui Street are closed to all traffic. Motorists are advised to use alternative routes. Traffic is busy now.

2024-10-02T10:14:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to watermain burst , all lanes of the section of Siu Sai Wan Road (Fullview Garden bound) between Sun Yip Street and Harmony Road is closed to all traffic. Motorists are advised to use alternative routes. Traffic is busy now.

2024-10-02T10:21:00.CONTENT_EN:
Due to watermain burst , all lanes of Siu Sai Wan Road (Fullview Garden bound) near Hiu Tsui Street is closed to all traffic. 
Below affected Citybus bus routes have to be diverted:

Siu Sai Wan (Island Resort) bound: 106, 106P, 118, 118P, 606, 606X, 788, 789, 82, 82S, 82X, 85, 85P, 88X, 8H, 8P, 8S, 8X, 976A, A12, X8

Chai Wan (East) bound: 682

Siu Sai Wan Estate bound: 694, 694S.  Motorists are advised to use alternative routes.   Traffic is busy now.
2024-10-02T10:21:00.CONTENT_CN:

2024-10-02T12:21:00.CONTENT_EN:
Due to watermain burst , the slow lane of Siu Sai Wan Road (Fullview Garden bound) near Hiu Tsui Street is still being closed to all traffic. 
Affected bus routes have gradually resumed normal. Only remaining lane is available to motorists.   Traffic is busy now.

2024-10-03T06:03:00.CONTENT_EN: The slow lane of Siu Sai Wan Road (Fullview Garden bound) near Hiu Tsui Street which was closed due to watermain burst is re-opened to all traffic.

2024-10-02T11:06:00.CONTENT_EN:
Lantau Link: 
Due to strong wind, the following temporary traffic measure is implemented on Lantau Link:
The speed limit of Lantau Link is reduced to 50km/h. 
.  Members of the public are advised to watch out for the latest traffic news through radio and television broadcasts, and for the traffic signs on site.

2024-10-03T12:10:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to improved weather condition, the following arrangements have been implemented on Hong Kong-Zhuhai-Macao Bridge (HZMB) Main Bridge: (i) The speed limit of the fast and middle lanes of HZMB Main Bridge has resumed 100 km/h; and (ii) The speed limit of the slow lane of HZMB Main Bridge has resumed 80km/h.
